ddls:
CREATE TABLE "substance_usage" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each usage record */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the data was collected */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data collection */,
  "narcotic_count" INTEGER /* Count of narcotic substances reported */,
  "non_narcotic_count" INTEGER /* Count of non-narcotic substances reported */,
  "percentage" REAL /* Percentage of narcotic usage compared to total substances */,
  "from_yearly_mean" REAL /* Deviation from the yearly mean for narcotic usage */,
  "yearly_mean" REAL /* Yearly mean for narcotic usage */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  "data_quality_score" INTEGER /* Data quality score */,
  "public_health_initiative_id" INTEGER /* ID of the public health initiative */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group of the population */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the population */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_substance_usage_state FOREIGN KEY ("state") REFERENCES states ("state_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_substance_usage_public_health_initiative_id FOREIGN KEY ("public_health_initiative_id") REFERENCES public_health_initiatives ("initiative_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_substance_usage_year FOREIGN KEY ("year") REFERENCES years ("year")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the state */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the state in square kilometers */,
  "capital_city" TEXT /* Capital city of the state */,
  "public_health_budget" REAL /* Annual public health budget for the state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data collection */,
  "is_complete" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the data for the year is complete */,
  "data_collection_method" TEXT /* Method used to collect data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "narcotic_data" (
  "narcotic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each narcotic record */,
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the usage record this narcotic data belongs to */,
  "narcotic_type" TEXT /* Type of narcotic substance */,
  "count" INTEGER /* Count of the specific narcotic substance */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group of the population using the narcotic */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the population using the narcotic */,
  "usage_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of usage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("narcotic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_narcotic_data_usage_id FOREIGN KEY ("usage_id") REFERENCES substance_usage ("usage_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "non_narcotic_data" (
  "non_narcotic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each non-narcotic record */,
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the usage record this non-narcotic data belongs to */,
  "non_narcotic_type" TEXT /* Type of non-narcotic substance */,
  "count" INTEGER /* Count of the specific non-narcotic substance */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group of the population using the non-narcotic */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the population using the non-narcotic */,
  "usage_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of usage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("non_narcotic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_non_narcotic_data_usage_id FOREIGN KEY ("usage_id") REFERENCES substance_usage ("usage_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, public health official) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level (e.g., read-only, full access) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* ID of the usage record being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_usage_id FOREIGN KEY ("usage_id") REFERENCES substance_usage ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "public_health_initiatives" (
  "initiative_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each public health initiative */,
  "initiative_name" TEXT /* Name of the public health initiative */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the initiative */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the initiative */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the initiative */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the initiative */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state where the initiative is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("initiative_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_public_health_initiatives_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)
